title: Pattern-Matrix Patterns Registry
description: Project-supplied override of the built-in pattern catalog for the pattern-matrix discovery agent. When .dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/pattern-matrix-patterns.yaml exists, its `patterns:` list REPLACES the agent's built-in defaults (does not merge). Each entry declares a kebab-case id, a description, and a `type` discriminator selecting the handler: regex (default; legacy), negative-space, coverage, outlier, or semantic. Phase 11 Task 1 extended the schema to a discriminated union. Entries WITHOUT a `type` field default to `regex` for backward compatibility with pre-Phase-11 registries.

patterns.description: Override list. Replaces the agent's built-in catalog when this file is present.

patternId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier surfaced in the agent's output.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the pattern catches.

catalogStatus.description: Phase 11 Task 2 — Loop status. See plugins/dw-lifecycle/src/scope-discovery/util/catalog-status.ts. Default `blessed` when omitted.

provenance.description: Phase 11 Task 2 — provenance block. Synthesized to install-seed when absent.

auditHistory.description: Phase 11 Task 10 — REVERSE provenance link to the audit-log. List of audit-log Finding-IDs that referenced this entry over time. Optional.

regexSource.description: RegExp source string. Compiled with the 'g' flag by the agent.

type.description: Discriminator. Optional — entries omitting `type` default to 'regex' for backward compatibility.

must_contain.description: Regex that MUST be present in each glob-matched file. Files matching the glob but containing zero matches for this regex are holdouts.

threshold.description: Minimum number of secondary-signal hits required to escalate a holdout to a finding (when secondary_contains is set). Defaults to 1.

secondary_contains.description: Optional secondary regex that strengthens the finding (e.g., utility-class consumption in a file that should consume design-system classes).

must_contain.description: Regex whose presence in a glob-matched file counts as adoption. The handler emits the adoption ratio as a synthesis-layer metric.

distance_metric.description: Feature vector to compare. token-composition: bag-of-words over alphanumeric tokens. className-composition: bag-of-words over JSX className attribute payloads.

threshold_sigma.description: Sigma threshold for outlier firing. Default 2.0 (~95th percentile per direction).

content_type.description: Phase 11 Task 13 — content-type discriminator for the token-composition tokenizer. 'auto' (default) infers from file extension: .ts/.tsx → ts; .md/.markdown → markdown; .css/.scss → css; .html/.htm → html; .yaml/.yml → yaml; .json → json. Ignored by the className-composition metric.

prompt_template.description: Template injected into the LLM prompt. The handler renders this with the file content + catalog metadata before dispatch. STUB in v1.1 Task 1 — the LLM wiring lands under Phase 11 Task 7.

model.description: Optional model identifier; the handler picks a default when unspecified.

confidence_threshold.description: Confidence below which a violation fires. Default 0.5.
